title: NICOTINE ANONYMOUS - 211info
text: NICOTINE ANONYMOUS WORLD SERVICES NICOTINE ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a locator tool with information about 12-step meetings for individuals interested in living nicotine-free lives. Support groups are available in person, by phone, and online. 6333 E Mockingbird Lane Suite 147-817 Dallas, TX 75214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (877) 879-6422 1-877 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (877) 879-6422 1-877-TRY-NICA Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Smoking Addiction Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
